items_flat.title_en: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Work for cross-app tasks
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 推出可跨 App 執行任務的 ChatGPT Work
items_flat.summary_en: Powered by Codex and GPT-5.6, ChatGPT Work was presented as a persistent agent that can act across files and apps and stay with projects for hours.
items_flat.summary_zh: ChatGPT Work 由 Codex 與 GPT-5.6 驅動，定位為可跨檔案與 App 操作、持續數小時完成專案的常駐代理。

items_flat.title_en: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna become generally available
items_flat.title_zh: GPT-5.6 Sol、Terra、Luna 正式全面推出
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI launched the GPT-5.6 family with a flagship Sol model, balanced Terra tier, efficient Luna tier, new reasoning modes, and stronger safety controls.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 正式推出 GPT-5.6 家族：旗艦 Sol、均衡 Terra、高效率 Luna，並加入新推理模式與更強防護。

openai.title_en: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Work for cross-app tasks
openai.title_zh: OpenAI 推出可跨 App 執行任務的 ChatGPT Work
